HR6691.reason: Community Safety and Security Act (115th) - included concealed carry reciprocity provisions requiring all states to recognize concealed carry permits from other states, effectively undermining stricter state permit requirements

HR2377.reason: Federal Extreme Risk Protection Order Act - creates federal red flag law allowing courts to temporarily remove firearms including from concealed carry holders, supporting permit-based carry restrictions

HR7910.reason: Protecting Our Kids Act - comprehensive gun safety bill that raises age requirements and strengthens regulations on firearms access, supporting the framework of regulated gun carry

HJRES44.reason: CRA disapproval of ATF pistol brace rule - voting Yea blocks regulation of braced pistols which are often carried concealed, loosening restrictions on concealed weapons

S2938.reason: Vehicle for Bipartisan Safer Communities Act - funds state crisis intervention programs including red flag laws that can temporarily restrict concealed carry for dangerous individuals
